content: Create a story about dragons with 3 chapters and a wiki. Write files to workspace/dragon-tale
The user wants a dragon story with 3 chapters and a wiki. I should delegate to the storyteller agent with the full task description and path.

{"name":"spawn_agent","arguments":{"agent":"storyteller","task":"Write a story about dragons with 3 chapters and a wiki. The story should have a protagonist, a conflict, and a resolution. Create the wiki content too. Write files to workspace/dragon-tale"}}

{"name":"spawn_agent","result":{"success":true,"data":{"summary":"I created files at workspace/dragon-tale: _plan.md, chapter-001.md, chapter-002.md, chapter-003.md, wiki/character/ember.md, wiki/location/dragon-peak.md, wiki/faction/scales-of-dawn.md"}}}
The storyteller completed the work. I should summarize for the user.
I delegated to the storyteller agent. They created a story about dragons at workspace/dragon-tale with 3 chapters and a wiki.
